summary: Tested messaging features: message sending, thread creation, reactions, and frontend UI. Backend: 19/19 tests passed. Frontend: All core messaging features working. Fixed 1 bug - TopNav.js was calling non-existent /api/messages/inbox endpoint.
critical_code_review_comments: All messaging APIs working correctly: send, start-conversation, react, get conversations, get messages
Rich media support (media_url) working - tested image message type
Threaded replies (reply_to_id) working - reply messages show preview
Message reactions working with toggle behavior - all 6 emojis (🤙, 🌊, ❤️, 🔥, 👏, 😂)
Invalid emoji rejection working - returns 400 for emojis not in allowed list
Frontend MessagesPage.js has proper data-testid attributes for all key elements
TopNav.js was calling wrong endpoint - FIXED: /api/messages/inbox → /api/messages/unread-counts
seed_data_creation: Created test messages with reactions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging feature is fully functional. Backend APIs at /api/messages/* all working. Frontend MessagesPage.js renders correctly with Primary/Requests tabs, conversation list, chat UI with message bubbles, reactions, reply previews, and media/voice buttons. Test users kelly@surf.com and photographer@surf.com have active conversation. Fixed bug in TopNav.js where wrong endpoint was being called.

backend_tests: POST /api/messages/send - Sends threaded replies with reply_to_id (PASSED)
frontend_features_verified: Primary/Requests tabs work with data-testid attributes
Conversation list displays with other user name and avatar
Chat UI shows message bubbles with gradient styling
Message reactions display inline with emoji counts
Reply preview shows above reply message
Send button appears when text is entered

bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use /api/messages/unread-counts/{user_id} which exists and returns correct data format
